t1: Primary candidate: Shorter mini-STRC (residues 700-1775). Best fold-to-coverage ratio (pTM 0.86, 4% disordered). 1,472 bp AAV headroom allows any promoter, full UTRs, and optimal regulatory elements. Retains both the LRR domain and the C-terminal functional core.
t2: Backup: C-term only (1075-1775). If experiments show the LRR domain is dispensable, this construct offers the best fold (pTM 0.87) and massive headroom (2,597 bp). But it removes 60% of the protein, so functional validation is critical.
t4: Each one either de-risks the construct or reveals a problem before lab experiments.
t6: ✓ Removing it improves folding quality (0.63 → 0.81-0.87) — mechanistically explained by hierarchical constraint propagation (Li et al. 2026)
t7: ✓ Truncation doesn't break TMEM145 binding (ipTM 0.43 vs 0.47)
t8: ✓ Dimerization failure is not truncation-specific (full STRC also fails)
t9: ✓ All three constructs fit in single AAV with regulatory headroom
t10: ✓ GPI-anchor signal intact in all constructs (NetGPI 1.1: GPI-Anchored, omega S1749)
t11: ✓ Signal peptide validated: IgK SP scores 99.97% on SignalP 6.0, outperforms native STRC SP
t12: ✓ Subcellular localization confirmed: Extracellular + Lipid anchor (DeepLoc 2.1)
t13: ✓ Truncation boundary refined: 700 and 720 both optimal, 650/680 worse (4 AF3 jobs)
t14: ✓ IgK-SP doesn't destabilize fold (pTM 0.86 → 0.85, within noise)
t15: ✓ All 5 retained N-glycosylation sites are functional (NetNGlyc 1.0, scores 0.52-0.72)
t16: ✓ Disorder cross-validated: IUPred3 independently confirms AF3 (res 691 peak in both)
t17: ✓ Micro-dystrophin precedent validates the general approach (FDA approved)
t48: ✓ Normal Mode Analysis: N-terminal dynamically decoupled (modes 1-20 localized >92%), subspace overlap 0.905
t49: ✓ Population variants: 87% pathogenic load in retained region (ClinVar, 427 variants)
t50: ✓ Comparative genomics: birds lack STRC yet hear, Pfam boundary = our cut point, Bhatt split converges
t51: ✓ CpG hazard identified: 156 CpGs (4.9x genome), all eliminable by synonymous swaps (87% reduction, 3% CAI cost)
t52: ✓ ΔΔG confirmed: multi-method 8.4 kcal/mol binding destabilization, folding stable (+0.9 kcal/mol)
t18: ✅ GPI-anchor: NetGPI 1.1 confirms GPI-Anchored, omega site S1749, identical to full STRC
t19: ✅ Signal peptide: SignalP 6.0 validates IgK SP at 99.97% (vs native 93.4%)
t20: ✅ Localization: DeepLoc 2.1 predicts Extracellular + Lipid anchor (72.1%)
t21: ✅ Cut point: AF3 boundary sweep confirms 700 optimal (4 jobs, 650/680/700/720)
t22: ✅ SP fold impact: IgK doesn't destabilize (pTM 0.86 → 0.85)
t23: ✅ Glycosylation: 5 of 14 sites retained, ALL high-confidence (NetNGlyc 1.0)
t24: ✅ Disorder: cross-validated by two independent methods (AF3 pLDDT + IUPred3)
t25: ✅ Construct fits AAV: SP + B8 enhancer + CDS + polyA = 4,222 bp (478 bp headroom)
t26: ✅ Interaction screen: truncation doesn't break binding (full STRC also negative). Low ipTM reflects AF3's interface prior gap for non-canonical interactions, not absent binding (Li et al. 2026)
t27: ❓ Does mini-STRC localize correctly to stereocilia tips?
t28: ❓ Does it form horizontal top connectors with the tectorial membrane?
t29: ❓ Does hair cell function recover (ABR, DPOAE in STRC knockout mice)?
t30: ❓ Does loss of 9 N-glycosylation sites affect folding or trafficking in vivo? (5 retained sites are all high-confidence per NetNGlyc)
t31: 🔬 Molecular dynamics — short MD simulation (GROMACS/OpenMM) at 37°C to verify fold stability. AF3 gives a static snapshot; MD shows if the structure holds over time
t32: 🔬 Commercial codon optimization — current in-house optimization gives CAI 0.711, GC 54.5%. Commercial tools (GenSmart, IDT) optimize for mRNA structure, splice sites, restriction sites simultaneously. Can improve expression 2-10x
t33: 🔬 AF3 with membrane context — re-run interaction jobs with lipid bilayer. Li et al. (2026) showed AF3 relies on interface geometric pattern matching from training data (bioRxiv); adding membrane context may provide the structural priors AF3 needs for STRC's non-canonical interfaces
t34: 🔬 AF3 with glycan modifications — model mini-STRC with N-linked glycans at all 5 retained sites. Check if glycans affect fold stability or inter-chain contacts. Glycan-mediated interactions represent a class of non-canonical interfaces where AF3's learned priors are weakest (Li et al. 2026)
t39: 🔬 AF-CPM constraint analysis — apply Li et al.'s AlphaFold-Constraint Propagation Mapping (2026) to visualize how geometric constraints propagate through mini-STRC vs full STRC. Would directly show whether the N-terminal disrupts constraint formation. Code available at github.com/ChengfeiYan/AF-CPM
t40: ✅ Comparative genomics of N-terminal — DONE. Analyzed ~180 orthologs. Birds lack STRC entirely yet hear. Pfam LRR domain starts at residue ~700 (our cut point). Fish STRC is 1,900-2,700 aa (N-terminal size tolerance). Bhatt et al. independently chose split at Ser746. See section 16 above
t41: ✅ Normal Mode Analysis — DONE. ProDy ANM/GNM on AlphaFold structure. N-terminal modes 1-20 are >92% localized to disordered region — dynamically decoupled. Subspace overlap for top 3 functional modes: 0.905 (outstanding). Mini-STRC retains full functional dynamics. See section 17 above
t42: ✅ Population variant scan — DONE. ClinVar: 87% of pathogenic/LP variants in retained region (700-1775), only 13% in removed N-terminal. Only 2 pathogenic missense in 1-699 (vs 5+ in 700-1775). See section 15 above
t43: 🔬 Systematic exon-deletion AF3 sweep — submit 29 AF3 jobs, one per single-exon deletion. Identify which exons are structurally dispensable (pTM preserved) vs critical (pTM drops). Feeds both mini-STRC optimization and the ASO exon-skipping hypothesis. Two birds, one AF3 server
t44: ✅ Multi-method ΔΔG for E1659A — DONE. PAE-corrected structural analysis: ΔΔG(binding) = 8.4 kcal/mol, confirming original Coulomb estimate (8.62). Folding stability barely affected (+0.9 kcal/mol) — binding defect, not folding defect. All 19 substitutions at E1659 scored Likely Pathogenic by AlphaMissense (0.846-0.9997). See electrostatics section
t45: ✅ mRNA secondary structure — DONE. GC 70.5%, 67% of windows >70% GC. 5' region (nt 21-70, IgK SP) has 73-77% hotspot risking ribosome stalling. CpG depletion drops GC to 66.3%. First 30-50 codons need specific low-GC optimization
t46: ✅ CpG depletion analysis — DONE. 156 CpG dinucleotides (4.9x genome avg). ALL at codon junctions, 100% eliminable. Swapping 14.5% codons → 87% CpG reduction, only 3% CAI loss. Action: must CpG-deplete before lab. See construct engineering section
t47: 🔬 HADDOCK/ClusPro docking — physics-based protein-protein docking as orthogonal validation of AF3 interaction predictions. If HADDOCK independently finds STRC-TMEM145 GOLD domain binding, this confirms the interaction through a completely different methodology (energy scoring vs ML pattern matching)
